mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dictation_clips (code, title, skill, level, topic, exam_type, script_text, storage_key, source, created_at) VALUES (#{code}, #{title}, #{skill}, #{level}, #{topic}, #{examType}, #{scriptText}, #{storageKey}, #{source}, now()) ON CONFLICT (code) DO UPDATE SET title = EXCLUDED.title, skill = EXCLUDED.skill, level = EXCLUDED.level, topic = EXCLUDED.topic, exam_type = EXCLUDED.exam_type, script_text = EXCLUDED.script_text, storage_key = EXCLUDED.storage_key, source = EXCLUDED.source
mapper.select:
SELECT id, code, title, skill, level, topic, exam_type, script_text, storage_key, source, created_at FROM dictation_clips WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, code, title, skill, level, topic, exam_type, script_text, storage_key, source, created_at FROM dictation_clips WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY random() LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT DISTINCT skill FROM dictation_clips WHERE skill IS NOT NULL ORDER BY skill
SELECT DISTINCT level FROM dictation_clips WHERE level IS NOT NULL ORDER BY level
SELECT DISTINCT topic FROM dictation_clips WHERE topic IS NOT NULL ORDER BY topic
SELECT DISTINCT exam_type FROM dictation_clips WHERE exam_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY exam_type
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dictation_attempts (clip_id, practice_item_id, user_id, user_transcript, accuracy, wer, created_at) VALUES (#{clipId}, #{practiceItemId}, #{userId}, #{userTranscript}, #{accuracy}, #{wer}, now())

INSERT INTO dictation_misses (attempt_id, user_id, clip_id, expected_word, actual_word, tag, created_at) VALUES
(#{miss.attemptId}, #{miss.userId}, #{miss.clipId}, #{miss.expectedWord}, #{miss.actualWord}, #{miss.tag}, now())
mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM dictation_misses WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND lower(expected_word) = lower(#{word})

SELECT a.id AS attempt_id, a.clip_id AS clip_id, c.title AS title, c.skill AS skill, c.level AS level, c.exam_type AS exam_type, a.accuracy AS accuracy, a.wer AS wer, a.created_at AS created_at FROM dictation_attempts a LEFT JOIN dictation_clips c ON c.id = a.clip_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dictation_practice_items (user_id, sentence_text, source, storage_key, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sentenceText}, #{source}, #{storageKey}, now())
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, sentence_text, source, storage_key, created_at FROM dictation_practice_items WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, user_id, sentence_text, source, storage_key, created_at FROM dictation_practice_items WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND storage_key IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE dictation_practice_items SET storage_key = #{storageKey} WHERE id = #{practiceItemId}
